benefits.description: 7 lbs weight loss in first week (1/27 to following week at 214.4 lbs), then minimal additional loss in week 2 (214.2 lbs). User reports appetite suppression reduced at 1.5mg dose.

protocol_notes: Started 1/27/2026 at 1.5mg weekly. Increased to 2mg following week. Maintaining 500-600 calorie deficit with prioritized protein intake. Daily morning weigh-ins after bathroom (fasted). Plans to increase to 2.5mg at end of current vial if response warrants. User clarifies not seeking rapid weight loss, only curious about typical response pattern.
